statement: Instruct agents to treat diagnostic output as ground truth. When the compiler or linter reports an error, fix it. Three rare exceptions: stale cache (clean and rebuild), missing dependency (install it), outdated language server (reload window). In all other cases, the diagnostic parsed the actual source tree and is correct.
publicSummary: Diagnostics are ground truth. Only three exceptions: stale cache, missing dep, outdated language server.
cautionNotes: Very rarely, language servers have genuine bugs. If an agent believes a diagnostic is wrong, it should state this explicitly.
